findings.description: The first table's structure does not match the PDF: the PDF includes a full-width contact row spanning the table, while the HTML places the contact information only in the left cell and leaves the right cell empty.
findings.evidence: PDF shows a single row across the table: "Kate Barrow [Contact Person] (919) 621-1116" centered/full-width beneath the location/call-in row. HTML represents this as: left cell "Kate Barrow [Contact Person] (919) 621-1116" and right cell empty.

findings.description: Stylistic emphasis present in the PDF is not preserved in several agenda entries, reducing fidelity of role/affiliation presentation.
findings.evidence: PDF italicizes items such as "Benita Purcell and Mark Fuhrmann", "Consent Agenda", "Matt Herr, JD, Acting Assistant Director for Systems Performance", "DHHS, Div. MH/DD/SAS", and the footer note "*Agenda subject to change without notice". HTML converts these to plain text except for the footer note.
